title: Medium Map Page Number (0x56)
description: Medium Map Page Number triplet layout. Length and TID are not mapped here; payload starts at offset 2.

elements.name: PageNum
elements.description: Sequence number of page (unsigned binary, 4 bytes, big-endian). Range X'00000001' to X'7FFFFFFF'.

notes: TID for this triplet is X'56'. Length field (offset 0) and TID (offset 1) are intentionally not mapped per instructions.
